footer.tagline: Empowering Pakistan through secure blood donation connectivity. Our platform bridges the gap between donors and those in urgent need, saving lives through technology.

bottom.rights: © 2024 Sehat ID. All rights reserved. Registered Life-Saving Organization in Pakistan.

home.badge: Pakistan's Most Trusted Emergency Blood Network
home.heroDesc: Connect instantly with verified blood donors across Pakistan. Our secure, real-time platform ensures that life-saving help is always just a click away.

searchWidget.locationPlaceholder: Enter your city (e.g. Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad)

home.socialProof: Join {count} verified heroes saving lives today

features.subtitle: SehatID is Pakistan's first fully encrypted blood donation network, prioritizing donor privacy and recipient safety above all else.

verified.title: Verified Identities
verified.desc: Every donor is verified through CNIC and phone authentication to ensure a 100% trustworthy network.

privacy.title: Privacy Focused
privacy.desc: Your personal data is encrypted. Contact details are only shared after a mutual match is confirmed.

speed.title: Real-time Matching
speed.desc: Our automated system finds the nearest compatible donor in seconds, saving critical time in emergencies.

process.subtitle: Join Pakistan's most secure blood donation network. Our streamlined digital process ensures rapid matching during critical medical emergencies.

step1.title: Register as Donor
step1.desc: Join Pakistan's largest verified network in less than 2 minutes.

step2.title: Search Nearby
step2.desc: Find compatible blood donors in your city with real-time tracking.

step3.title: Connect & Save
step3.desc: Coordinate safely with verified donors and save a life today.

emergency.subtitle: Real-time blood requests from verified medical institutions. Your response can save a life in the next hour.

finalCta.title: Every Drop is a Gift of Life.
finalCta.subtitle: Whether you are a donor or a patient, we are here to support you. Join Pakistan's fastest growing blood network today.

stories.title: Real People. Real Impact.
stories.subtitle: Connecting donors with patients is more than just data—it's about saving lives across Pakistan.

story1.name: Ahmed Raza
story1.text: Finding O-negative blood at 2 AM seemed impossible. SehatID connected us with a verified donor in under 15 minutes. Truly a life-saver.

profile.title: Donor Profile
profile.privacyDesc: Your security is our priority. Sehat ID uses enterprise-grade encryption to protect your identity.
profile.privacyFeature1: Your CNIC is cryptographically hashed and never stored in plain text.
profile.privacyFeature2: Phone numbers are hidden from public view and only shared with verified medical requests.
profile.privacyFeature3: All data processing complies with healthcare privacy standards in Pakistan.
profile.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

findDonors.title: Find Blood Donors
findDonors.subtitle: Connect with verified donors across Pakistan in real-time.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your SehatID account

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

about.title: About Sehat ID
about.subtitle: Pakistan's Digital Blood Network. Built for Privacy. Dedicated to Life.
about.mission: "To ensure no life is lost in Pakistan due to lack of timely access to compatible blood donors."
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide our clinical and digital operations.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: We utilize advanced CNIC hashing and data encryption to ensure your identity remains protected until a match is confirmed.

integrity.title: Clinical Integrity
integrity.desc: Our algorithms strictly follow international medical matching standards to ensure donor and recipient compatibility.

profit.title: Zero Profit
profit.desc: Sehat ID is a humanitarian project. The platform is, and will always be, 100% free for all citizens and medical centers.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Every request is logged and verifiable. We maintain high standards of accountability for every blood unit managed.

about.lifecycleDesc: For decades, finding blood donors in Pakistan has relied on chaotic social media posts and word-of-mouth. We are changing that.

reality.title: The Current Reality
reality.item1: Scattered donor lists and outdated phone numbers.
reality.item2: Privacy risks when sharing CNICs on public groups.
reality.item3: No clinical validation of medical history before request.

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.desc: Your contribution can be the difference between life and death. Register as a donor today and be part of Pakistan's safest digital blood network.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your donor profile, track donations, and help save lives.

findDonors.title: Find Blood Donors
findDonors.desc: Search donors by blood group and city.
